stages.concept:
# Unit 151: as if + 가정법 과거 - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 **as if + 가정법 과거**에 대해 배워볼까요?

> She talks **as if** she **knew** everything.
> 그녀는 마치 모든 것을 아는 것처럼 말한다. (실제: 다 알지 못한다)

👩‍🏫 선생님: **as if (= as though) + 과거동사** — 마치 ~인 것처럼 (현재 사실의 반대)

> He acts **as if** he **were** the boss.
> 그는 마치 사장인 것처럼 행동한다. (실제: 사장이 아니다)

> She looks **as if** she **were** happy.
> 그녀는 마치 행복한 것처럼 보인다. (실제: 행복하지 않다)

> He spends money **as if** he **were** rich.
> 그는 마치 부자인 것처럼 돈을 쓴다. (실제: 부자가 아니다)

👩‍🏫 선생님: be동사는 역시 **were**를 써요!

> He talks **as if** he **were** an expert.
> 그는 마치 전문가인 것처럼 말한다.

**Q. 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 단어를 고르세요.**
"He acts as if he (       ) a superhero."
1. is
2. are
3. were ✅

👩‍🏫 선생님: 훌륭해요! '그는 마치 자신이 슈퍼히어로인 것처럼 행동한다'는 현재 사실의 반대를 가정하는 내용이므로, be동사는 인칭과 수에 상관없이 항상 were를 써야 한답니다.

🧑‍🎓 학생: as if + 과거동사/were = 마치 ~인 것처럼 (현재 사실 반대)! I wish와 같은 패턴이네요.
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 151: as if + 가정법 과거 - 연습문제 A

**01.** 주어진 단어를 이용하여 가정법 과거 문장을 완성하시오.
English is not her native language.
She speaks English as if it (     ) her native language.
> **정답** were

---

**02.** He is not rich.
He spends money as if he (     ) rich.
> **정답** were

---

**03.** She doesn't know him.
She talks about him as if she (     ) him.
> **정답** knew

---

**04.** He is not a singer.
He sings as if he (     ) a singer.
> **정답** were

---

**05.** She is not tired.
She looks as if she (     ) tired.
> **정답** were

---

**06.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
He talks as if he is the boss.
(가정법 과거)
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** is → were

---

**07.** She acts as if she knows everything.
(가정법 과거)
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** knows → knew

---

**08.** He eats as if he is hungry.
(실제로 배고프지 않음)
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** is → were

---

**09.** She dresses as if she is a model.
(가정법 과거)
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** is → were

---

**10.** He walks as if he owns the place.
(가정법 과거)
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** owns → owned

---

**11.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
그는 마치 부자인 것처럼 돈을 쓴다.
He spends money as if he rich.
> **정답** were

---

**12.** 그녀는 마치 모든 것을 아는 것처럼 행동한다.
She acts as if she everything.
> **정답** knew

---

**13.** 그는 마치 가수인 것처럼 노래한다.
He sings as if he a singer.
> **정답** were

---

**14.** 그녀는 마치 피곤한 것처럼 보인다.
She looks as if she tired.
> **정답** were

---

**15.** 그는 마치 그곳을 아는 것처럼 걸어간다.
He walks as if he the place.
> **정답** knew

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
그녀는 마치 공주인 것처럼 행동한다.
She as acts if she were a princess
> **정답** She / acts / as / if / she / were / a / princess

---

**17.** 그는 마치 배고픈 것처럼 먹는다.
He as eats if he were hungry
> **정답** He / eats / as / if / he / were / hungry

---

**18.** 그녀는 마치 영어 원어민인 것처럼 말한다.
She speaks English as if it were her native language
> **정답** She / speaks / English / as / if / it / were / her / native / language

---

**19.** 그는 마치 사장인 것처럼 말한다.
He as talks if he were the boss
> **정답** He / talks / as / if / he / were / the / boss

---

**20.** 그녀는 마치 모델인 것처럼 옷을 입는다.
She as dresses if she were a model
> **정답** She / dresses / as / if / she / were / a / model
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 151: as if + 가정법 과거 - 연습문제 B

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
The boy talks as if he ______________ my friend.
But he is not my friend.
was
will be
were
has been
> **정답** were

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
Sarah behaves as if she _____________ everything.
But she doesn't know anything.
know
has known
knew
had known
> **정답** knew

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
I feel as if I _____________ a real strong man.
But I am not a real strong man.
was
could have been
were
had been
> **정답** were

---

**04.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
He sounds as if he ____________ a cold.
But he doesn't have a cold.
had
has had
had had
have
> **정답** had

---

**05.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
She pretends as if she _____________ a report by
herself.
But she doesn't write a report by herself.
was written
wrote
had written
has written
> **정답** wrote

---

**06.** 다음 문장과 의미가 같은 문장을 고르시오.
In fact, he is not a doctor.
He talks as if he were not a doctor.
He talks as if he is a doctor.
He talks as if he were a doctor.
He talks as if he is not a doctor.
> **정답** He talks as if he were a doctor.

---

**07.** 다음 문장과 의미가 같은 문장을 고르시오.
In fact, Jenny doesn't like to study English.
Jenny talks as if she doesn't like to study
English.
Jenny talks as if she liked to study English.
Jenny talks as if she didn't like to study
English.
Jenny talks as if she likes to study English.
> **정답** Jenny talks as if she liked to study English.

---

**08.** 다음 문장과 의미가 같은 문장을 고르시오.
In fact, he doesn't have a good relationship with his
sister.
He behaves as if he doesn't have a good
relationship with his sister.
He behaves as if he had a good relationship
with his sister.
He behaves as if he has a good relationship
with his sister.
He behaves as if he had had a good
relationship with his sister.
> **정답** He behaves as if he had a good relationship with his sister.

---

**09.** 다음 문장과 의미가 같은 문장을 고르시오.
They look as if they knew each other.
In fact, they know each other.
In fact, they don't know each other.
In fact, they knew each other.
In fact, they didn't know each other.
> **정답** In fact, they don't know each other.

---

**10.** 다음 문장과 의미가 같은 문장을 고르시오.
In fact, Steven is not an expert on computer
programming.
Steven talks as if he were an expert on
computer programming.
Steven talks as if he weren't an expert on
computer programming.
Steven talks as if he is an expert on computer
programming.
Steven talks as if he isn't an expert on
computer programming.
> **정답** Steven talks as if he were an expert on computer programming.

---

**11.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 문장을 고르시오.
He says to me as if he were in Korea.
She treats me as if I'm her son.
He talks as if he had a lot of money.
He talks as if he knew everything about
robots.
> **정답** She treats me as if I'm her son.

---

**12.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 문장을 고르시오.
They act as if I did something wrong.
Thomas talks as if he knew everything.
He acts as if he were a baby.
She talks as if she likes him.
> **정답** She talks as if she likes him.

---

**13.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 문장을 고르시오.
Tom plays football as if he were a professional
football player.
She spends money as if she has a lot of
money.
Jason talks as if he were good at playing golf.
James acts as if he were a child.
> **정답** She spends money as if she has a lot of money.

---

**14.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 문장을 고르시오.
They talk as if they have known the truth
about the accident.
He acts as if nothing happened between us.
Sally talks as if she were very close to
Jennifer.
My foreign friends pretend as if they liked
Kimchi.
> **정답** They talk as if they have known the truth about the accident.

---

**15.** 다음 우리말을 영어로 바르게 옮긴 것을 고르시오.
Tim은 마치 자기가 그 대회의 우승자인것처럼 말한다.
Tim talks as if he is the winner of the contest.
Tim talks as if he had been the winner of the
contest.
Tim talks as if he were the winner of the
contest.
Tim talks as if he was the winner of the
contest.
> **정답** Tim talks as if he were the winner of the contest.

---

**16.** 다음 우리말을 영어로 바르게 옮긴 것을 고르시오.
그는 마치 자기가 경찰관인것처럼 행동한다.
He behaves as if he is a police officer.
He behaves as if he isn't a police officer.
He behaves as if he were a police officer.
He behaves as if he weren't a police officer.
> **정답** He behaves as if he were a police officer.

---

**17.** 다음 우리말을 영어로 바르게 옮긴 것을 고르시오.
그는 마치 내 여동생을 아는 것 처럼 말한다.
He talks as if he had known my sister.
He talks as if he has known my sister.
He talks as if he knows my sister.
He talks as if he knew my sister.
> **정답** He talks as if he knew my sister.

---

**18.** 다음 우리말을 영어로 바르게 옮긴 것을 고르시오.
아버지는 마치 자동차 수리하는 법을 아는 것처럼 말씀하신다.
My father talks as if he knew how to fix his car.
My father talks as if he doesn't know how to
fix his car.
My father talks as if he knows how to fix his
car.
My father talks as if he had known how to fix
his car.
> **정답** My father talks as if he knew how to fix his car.

---

**19.** 다음 대화의 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
A: Does Allen speak Chinese?
B: I don't think so. But
________________________________.
she talks as if she spoke Chinese fluently
she talks as if she will speak Chinese fluently
she talks as if she speaks Chinese fluently
she talks as if she has spoken Chinese fluently
> **정답** she talks as if she spoke Chinese fluently

---

**20.** 다음 대화의 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
A: Do you think Jason can fix my computer?
B: I am sure he can't.
A: Really? But
_______________________________________.
he acts as if he was a computer expert
he acts as if he is a computer expert
he acts as if he weren't a computer expert
he acts as if he were a computer expert
> **정답** he acts as if he were a computer expert
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 151 as if + 가정법 과거중1 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** 주어진 문장과 의미가 같도록 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
In fact, he doesn't play basketball well.
→ He talks as if  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) .
정답 he, played, basketball, well

---

**02.** 주어진 문장과 의미가 같도록 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
In fact, they don't live in a big city.
→ They pretends as if  (     )   (     )  
  (     )   (     ) .
정답 they, lived, in, a, big, city

---

**03.** 주어진 문장과 의미가 같도록 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
In fact, I'm not her boss.
→ She treats me as if  (     )   (     )  
.
정답 I, were, her, boss

---

**04.** 주어진 문장과 의미가 같도록 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
In fact, she doesn't know how to drive a car.
→ She talks as if  (     )   (     )   (     )  
  (     )   (     ) .
정답 she, knew, how, to, drive, a, car

---

**05.** 우리말과 일치하도록 주어진 단어를 사용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
그는 마치 그녀의 전화번호를 아는 것처럼 말한다.
힌트 (     ) know her phone number
He talks  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  
  (     ) .
정답 as, if (though), he, knew, her, phone, number

---

**06.** 우리말과 일치하도록 주어진 단어를 사용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
그녀는 마치 매주 일요일마다 교회에 가는 것처럼 행동한
다.
힌트 (     ) go to the church
She behaves  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  
  (     )  every Sunday.
정답 as, if (though), she, went, to, the, church

---

**07.** 우리말과 일치하도록 주어진 단어를 바르게 배열하여
문장을 완성하시오. (필요시 형태를 변형할 것)
그녀는 내가 그녀의 남동생인 것처럼 나를 도와주었다.
힌트 (     ) her, brother, I, if, am, as
She helped me  (     )   (     )   (     )  
  (     ) .
정답 as, if, I, were, her, brother

---

**08.** 우리말과 일치하도록 주어진 단어를 바르게 배열하여
문장을 완성하시오. (필요시 형태를 변형할 것)
Howard는 여동생이 있는 것처럼 행동한다.
힌트 (     ) have, if, he, as, a, sister
Howard pretends  (     )   (     )   (     )  
  (     ) .
정답 as, if, he, had, a, sister

---

**09.** 어법상 틀린 곳을 찾아 바르게 고쳐 쓰시오.
Kelly says to me as if she is doing well. In fact, she
is doing well.
→ Kelly says to me as if she  (     ) . In
fact, she is not doing well.
정답 were doing well

---

**10.** 어법상 틀린 곳을 찾아 바르게 고쳐 쓰시오.
The boy pretends as if he knew the correct answer.
In fact, he didn't know the answer.
→ The boy pretends as if he knew the correct
answer. In fact, he
.
정답 doesn't know the answer (does not know the answer)
answer)

---
stages.practical:
# Unit 151: as if + 가정법 과거 - 변형문제

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
The girl talks as if she ______________ my sister.
But she is not my sister. was will be were has been
> 정답: were

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
Tom behaves as if he _____________ everything.
But he doesn't know anything. know has known knew had known
> 정답: knew

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
I feel as if I _____________ a real brave person.
But I am not a real brave person. was could have been were had been
> 정답: were

---

**04.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
She sounds as if she ____________ a fever.
But she doesn't have a fever. had has had had had have
> 정답: had

---

**05.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
He pretends as if he _____________ the essay by himself.
But he doesn't write the essay by himself. was written wrote had written has written
> 정답: wrote

---

**06.** 다음 문장과 의미가 같은 문장을 고르시오.
In fact, she is not a singer.
She talks as if she were not a singer.
She talks as if she is a singer.
She talks as if she were a singer.
She talks as if she is not a singer.
> 정답: She talks as if she were a singer.

---

**07.** 다음 문장과 의미가 같은 문장을 고르시오.
In fact, Tom doesn't like to play tennis.
Tom talks as if he doesn't like to play tennis.
Tom talks as if he liked to play tennis.
Tom talks as if he didn't like to play tennis.
Tom talks as if he likes to play tennis.
> 정답: Tom talks as if he liked to play tennis.

---

**08.** 다음 문장과 의미가 같은 문장을 고르시오.
In fact, she doesn't have a close friendship with her neighbor.
She behaves as if she doesn't have a close friendship with her neighbor.
She behaves as if she had a close friendship with her neighbor.
She behaves as if she has a close friendship with her neighbor.
She behaves as if she had had a close friendship with her neighbor.
> 정답: She behaves as if she had a close friendship with her

---

**09.** 다음 문장과 의미가 같은 문장을 고르시오.
They look as if they understood the topic.
In fact, they understand the topic.
In fact, they don't understand the topic.
In fact, they understood the topic.
In fact, they didn't understand the topic.
> 정답: In fact, they don't understand the topic.

---

**10.** 다음 문장과 의미가 같은 문장을 고르시오.
In fact, Amy is not an expert on cooking.
Amy talks as if she were an expert on cooking.
Amy talks as if she weren't an expert on cooking.
Amy talks as if she is an expert on cooking.
Amy talks as if she isn't an expert on cooking.
> 정답: Amy talks as if she were an expert on cooking.

---

**11.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 문장을 고르시오.
He says to me as if he were in Japan.
She treats me as if I'm her daughter.
He talks as if he had a lot of talent.
He talks as if he knew everything about art.
> 정답: She treats me as if I'm her daughter.

---

**12.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 문장을 고르시오.
They act as if I made a mistake.
Amy talks as if she knew everything.
He acts as if he were a prince.
She talks as if she likes him.
> 정답: She talks as if she likes him.

---

**13.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 문장을 고르시오.
Tom plays basketball as if he were a professional player.
She spends time as if she has a lot of free time.
Mike talks as if he were good at playing chess.
Amy acts as if she were a child.
> 정답: She spends time as if she has a lot of free time.

---

**14.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 문장을 고르시오.
They talk as if they have known the secret about the project.
He acts as if nothing happened between us.
Amy talks as if she were very close to Tom.
My classmates pretend as if they liked the cafeteria food.
> 정답: They talk as if they have known the secret about the accident.

---

**15.** 다음 우리말을 영어로 바르게 옮긴 것을 고르시오.
Amy는 마치 자기가 그 팀의 리더인 것처럼 말한다.
Amy talks as if she is the leader of the team.
Amy talks as is she had been the leader of the team.
Amy talks as if she were the leader of the team.
Amy talks as if she was the leader of the team.
